competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

provider.name: FIFA Official API

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Goal! France 0, England 1. Declan Rice (England) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner.

events.description: 德克兰·赖斯破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jarell Quansah (England).
Attempt blocked. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门被封堵。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射门被封堵。 萨卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Malo Gusto.
Attempt blocked. Eberechi Eze (England) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Morgan Rogers.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹射门被封堵。 摩根·罗杰斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Eberechi Eze (England) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Rayan Cherki (France) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Dean Henderson (England).
Attempt blocked. Warren Zaïre-Emery (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 沃伦·扎伊尔·埃默里射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Bukayo Saka is caught offside.
Ivan Toney (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, France. Conceded by Marc Guéhi.
Attempt blocked. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Eberechi Eze with a through ball.

events.description: 萨卡射门被封堵。 埃贝雷奇·埃兹参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Maxence Lacroix.
Goal! France 0, England 2. Ezri Konsa (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 埃兹里·康萨破门。 比分 0-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Malo Gusto (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ibrahima Konaté (France).

events.description: 易卜拉希马·科纳特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Ivan Toney is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Jarell Quansah (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Morgan Rogers.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射正。 摩根·罗杰斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Ivan Toney is caught offside.
Foul by Djed Spence (England).
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Dean Henderson (England). Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Dean Henderson.
Attempt saved. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Bukayo Saka.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射正。 萨卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Marcus Rashford.

events.description: 萨卡射门被封堵。 马库斯·拉什福德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 0, England 3. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Marcus Rashford following a fast break.
Foul by Ezri Konsa (England).
Substitution, France. Ousmane Dembélé replaces Rayan Cherki.

events.description: 登贝莱替补登场，换下拉扬·切尔基。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Désiré Doué.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉替补登场，换下德西尔·杜埃。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Lucas Digne replaces Théo Hernández.

events.description: 卢卡斯·迪涅替补登场，换下西奥·埃尔南德斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Dayot Upamecano replaces Ibrahima Konaté.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺替补登场，换下易卜拉希马·科纳特。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. Ollie Watkins replaces Marcus Rashford.

events.description: 奥利·瓦特金斯替补登场，换下马库斯·拉什福德。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ibrahima Konaté (France).

events.description: 易卜拉希马·科纳特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 0, England 4. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Eberechi Eze with a through ball.
Attempt blocked. Ivan Toney (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Morgan Rogers.

events.description: 伊万·托尼射门被封堵。 摩根·罗杰斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Maxence Lacroix.
Ibrahima Konaté (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
First Half ends, France 0, England 4.
Second Half begins France 0, England 4.
Foul by Djed Spence (England).
Goal! France 1, England 4. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball following a fast break.
Attempt missed. Ollie Watkins (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a through ball.

events.description: 奥利·瓦特金斯射门偏出。 萨卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Eberechi Eze (England) left footed shot from more than 35 yards misses to the left. Assisted by Marc Guéhi following a fast break.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹射门偏出。 马克·盖希参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 2, England 4. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé with a through ball.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉破门。 比分 2-4。

qualifiers.espnText: Morgan Rogers (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Offside, France. Ousmane Dembélé is caught offside.
Bukayo Saka (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, England. Conceded by Dayot Upamecano.
Attempt saved. Ivan Toney (England) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross.

events.description: 伊万·托尼射正。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Warren Zaïre-Emery.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 沃伦·扎伊尔·埃默里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Declan Rice (England).
Attempt blocked. Eberechi Eze (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ollie Watkins.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹射门被封堵。 奥利·瓦特金斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Dean Henderson (England). Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 登贝莱射正。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Dayot Upamecano (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Dean Henderson (England). Assisted by Warren Zaïre-Emery.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺射正。 沃伦·扎伊尔·埃默里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 3, England 4. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise.
Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé with a through ball.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Jarell Quansah (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Marc Guéhi (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Ivan Toney (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left.
Bukayo Saka (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ollie Watkins (England).
Attempt blocked. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is blocked.
Morgan Rogers (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, England. Elliot Anderson replaces Ivan Toney.

events.description: 艾略特·安德森替补登场，换下伊万·托尼。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. Jude Bellingham replaces Eberechi Eze.

events.description: 贝林厄姆替补登场，换下埃贝雷奇·埃兹。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Ollie Watkins.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射正。 奥利·瓦特金斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Morgan Rogers (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.

events.description: 摩根·罗杰斯射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (England).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Jarell Quansah (England).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, England. Reece James replaces Jarell Quansah because of an injury.

events.description: 里斯·詹姆斯替补登场，换下贾雷尔·夸萨。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Dean Henderson (England). Assisted by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Penalty England. Djed Spence draws a foul in the penalty area.
Goal! France 3, England 5. Bukayo Saka (England) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Attempt blocked. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射门被封堵。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Reece James.
Substitution, France. Jules Koundé replaces Malo Gusto because of an injury.

events.description: 朱尔斯·昆德替补登场，换下马洛·古斯托。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, England. Trevoh Chalobah replaces Marc Guéhi.

events.description: 特雷沃·查洛巴替补登场，换下马克·盖希。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Djed Spence (England).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! France 4, England 5. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Dayot Upamecano following a fast break.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时7分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 4, England 6. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner following a fast break.

events.description: 贝林厄姆破门。 比分 4-6。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, France 4, England 6.
Bukayo Saka's finish was ruled out for offside in the 11th minute.
qualifiers.source: FIFA Official Match Report + FIFA Official Timeline + ESPN Public Summary

events.description: 萨卡破门，但因越位进球被取消。比分仍为 0-1。

officials.name: 赫苏斯·瓦伦苏埃拉·萨斯
